differentials.name: Bronchioloalveolar cell carcinoma =  only primary lung tumor to produce multifocal ill-defined densities with air bronchograms
differentials.raw: Bronchioloalveolar cell carcinoma =  only primary lung tumor to produce multifocal ill-defined densities with air bronchograms

differentials.name: Alveolar type of lymphoma =  massive accumulation of tumor cells in interstitium with compression atelectasis + obstructive pneumonia
differentials.raw: Alveolar type of lymphoma =  massive accumulation of tumor cells in interstitium with compression atelectasis + obstructive pneumonia

differentials.name: Metastases (a)  Choriocarcinoma: hemorrhage (however rare) (b)  Vascular tumors: malignant hemangiomas
differentials.raw: Metastases (a)  Choriocarcinoma: hemorrhage (however rare) (b)  Vascular tumors: malignant hemangiomas
